model.requested_alias_note: Per Codex 2026-05-14 F2 [high]: the Claude shim invokes `claude -p --model $CILOGBENCH_CLAUDE_MODEL` with default 'sonnet' for v2. tools/run_diagnosis.py validates cache hits against `requested_alias` (when present) instead of the dated `model_name`, so the validator agrees with what the shim persists.

cache_key_env_note: Per Codex 2026-05-14 F2 [high]: CILOGBENCH_CLAUDE_MODEL overrides the alias the Claude shim sends to `claude -p --model`. The runner folds its value into the diagnosis cache_key so a re-run with the env set to a non-default value does not silently replay a row computed against the default 'sonnet'. Adding this field invalidates existing v2 cache entries by design — on next re-run, cache misses will produce fresh rows with metadata.model_info populated by the updated Claude shim.
